channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HDFCLIFE] HDFC Life Insurance Appoints Mr Vijay Vaidyanathan as Chief Human Resource Officer
item.description:
HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd has appointed Mr Vijay Vaidyanathan as the Chief Human Resource Officer. Mr Vaidyanathan, who has been associated with the company since June 2001, will take up his new role from April 01, 2026. He brings 25 years of experience across insurance distribution, strategic partnerships and organisational leadership. Mr Vaidyanathan has held diverse leadership roles in the company and has been actively involved in organisation-wide strategic and people initiatives.

  • HDFC Life Insurance appoints Mr Vijay Vaidyanathan as Chief Human Resource Officer
  • Mr Vaidyanathan has been associated with HDFC Life since June 2001
  • He brings 25 years of experience across insurance distribution, strategic partnerships and organisational leadership
  • Mr Vaidyanathan will take up his new role from April 01, 2026
  • He has held diverse leadership roles in the company and has been actively involved in organisation-wide strategic and people initiatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ASHOKLEY] Ashok Leyland Clarifies Non-Materiality of Recent Announcement Despite Market Reaction
item.description:
Ashok Leyland Ltd has clarified that a recent announcement reported in the Economic Times did not constitute a material event under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015. The company asserts that the announcement was made through a press conference and was not the cause of the price change in the company's shares during the day. Ashok Leyland reaffirms its commitment to disclosing material information as required by regulatory standards.

  • Ashok Leyland clarifies that a recent announcement did not constitute a material event under SEBI regulations.
  • The company asserts that the announcement was made through a press conference.
  • Ashok Leyland denies any connection between the announcement and the price change in its shares.
  • The company reaffirms its commitment to disclosing material information as required by regulatory standards.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASHOK LEYLAND LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HDFCLIFE] HDFC Life Insurance Grants 10,000 Stock Options Under Employee Stock Option Scheme - 2022
item.description:
HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, announced that its Nomination & Remuneration Committee has granted 10,000 equity stock options. These options, each of the face value of Rs. 10/, are granted at a price of Rs. 668.55/- convertible into one equity share each upon vesting and exercise. The options will be vested as per the following schedule: 50% of Options granted on the 3rd anniversary from the date of grant, and 50% of Options granted on the 4th anniversary from the date of grant. The vested options need to be exercised within a period of 5 years from the date of respective vesting, failing which, they shall lapse forthwith.

  • HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd grants 10,000 equity stock options
  • Options granted at a price of Rs. 668.55/- each
  • Options convertible into one equity share each upon vesting and exercise
  • Options to be vested on the 3rd and 4th anniversary from the date of grant
  • Vested options need to be exercised within 5 years from the date of respective vesting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [DMART] Avenue Supermarts Ltd Opens 8 New Stores Across India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avenue Supermarts Ltd, the company that operates the popular retail chain D-Mart, has announced the opening of 8 new stores. The new stores are located in Modasa, Aravalli, Gujarat; Sancoale, Goa; Quark City, S.A.S Nagar, Punjab; Adilabad, Telangana; Hubli, Dharwad, Karnataka; IMT Bawal, Rewari, Haryana; Vidisha, Madhya Pradesh; and Ajabpur, Dehradun, Uttarakhand. This brings the total number of stores to 461.

  • Avenue Supermarts Ltd opens 8 new stores
  • New stores located in Modasa, Aravalli, Gujarat; Sancoale, Goa; Quark City, S.A.S Nagar, Punjab; Adilabad, Telangana; Hubli, Dharwad, Karnataka; IMT Bawal, Rewari, Haryana; Vidisha, Madhya Pradesh; and Ajabpur, Dehradun, Uttarakhand
  • Total number of stores now stands at 461

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avenue Supermarts Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [AMITINT] Amit International Ltd. to Appoint Ms. Sungandha Narayan Jagtap as Additional Independent Women Director
item.description:
Amit International Ltd. has informed the BSE that the Board of Directors of the company will meet on 12th March 2026. The agenda includes the approval of the appointment of Ms. Sungandha Narayan Jagtap as an Additional Independent Women Director. The meeting will also consider any other business with the permission of the Chairperson.

  • Amit International Ltd. to propose the appointment of Ms. Sungandha Narayan Jagtap as an Additional Independent Women Director
  • The Board Meeting is scheduled for 12th March 2026
  • The meeting will consider any other business with the permission of the Chairperson

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMIT INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WIMPLAST] Wim Plast Ltd: Retirement of Independent Director & Appointment of New Independent Director
item.description:
Wim Plast Ltd has informed about the retirement of Independent Director Mr. Sudhakar L. Mondkar due to completion of his second term. The company has also announced the appointment of Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent Director) for a term of 5 years, subject to shareholder's approval.

  • Retirement of Independent Director Mr. Sudhakar L. Mondkar.
  • Appointment of Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent Director).
  • Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka's appointment is subject to approval of the shareholders.
  • Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka is not related to the Promoter or Promoter Group or any of the Directors/ Key Managerial Personnel of the Company.
  • Re-constitution of Committees of Board of Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIM PLAST LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JYOTI] Jyoti Ltd. Secures ¥ 5.38 Crore Purchase Order from PVR Projects LTD.
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jyoti Ltd. has announced that it has secured a purchase order of ¥ 5.38 Crores (Excluding GST) for 10 Nos. Large Capacity VT Pumps from M/s. PVR Projects LTD., Hyderabad. The order is for the Jawahar Lift Irrigation Scheme, located at Khammam, Telangana -507203. The payment terms, packing & forwarding, freight, insurance, and warranty details are as per the purchase order. The order is domestic, and the delivery time is 4.5 months. The total order value is ¥ 5.38 Crores (Excluding GST). There is no interest or related party transaction involving the promoter/promoter group/group companies.

  • Jyoti Ltd. secures a purchase order of ¥ 5.38 Crores from PVR Projects LTD.
  • The order is for the supply of 10 Nos. Large Capacity VT Pumps for the Jawahar Lift Irrigation Scheme, Telangana.
  • The order value is ¥ 5.38 Crores (Excluding GST) with a delivery time of 4.5 months.
  • The payment terms, packing & forwarding, freight, insurance, and warranty details are as per the purchase order.
  • There is no interest or related party transaction involving the promoter/promoter group/group companies.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JYOTI LTD.-$ | Category: Deals

item.title: [SOLARINDS] Solar Industries India Ltd Conducts Bhoomi Pujan for Robotics and UAV Manufacturing Facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Solar Industries India Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary Solar Defence and Aerospace Limited, conducted the Bhoomi Pujan ceremony for its upcoming Robotics and Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) manufacturing facility at the MIHAN Special Economic Zone (SEZ) in Nagpur on March 7, 2026. The ceremony was performed by Shri Devendra Ji Fadnavis, Hon’ble Chief Minister of Maharashtra, and Shri Nitin Ji Gadkari, Hon’ble Union Minister of Road Transport and Highways. This facility signifies a strategic expansion into advanced defence technologies, autonomous systems, and robotics-enabled solutions, focusing on the development and manufacturing of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), robotics platforms, and next-generation defence technologies.

  • Solar Industries India Ltd conducts Bhoomi Pujan for Robotics and UAV manufacturing facility.
  • The facility is a strategic expansion into advanced defence technologies, autonomous systems, and robotics-enabled solutions.
  • The proposed facility will focus on the development and manufacturing of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), robotics platforms, and next-generation defence technologies.
  • The ceremony was performed by Shri Devendra Ji Fadnavis, Hon’ble Chief Minister of Maharashtra, and Shri Nitin Ji Gadkari, Hon’ble Union Minister of Road Transport and Highways.
  • Solar Industries India Ltd is committed to supporting the nation’s vision for self-reliance in defence manufacturing and technological advancements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOLAR INDUSTRIES INDIA LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [WIMPLAST] Wim Plast Ltd: Retirement of Independent Director & Appointment of New Independent Director
item.description:
Wim Plast Ltd has announced the retirement of Independent Director, Mr. Sudhakar L. Mondkar, due to completion of his second term. The company has also appointed Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent Director) for a term of 5 years, subject to approval of the shareholders. The re-constitution of Committees of Board of Directors has also been announced.

  • Retirement of Independent Director, Mr. Sudhakar L. Mondkar.
  • Appointment of Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent Director).
  • Re-constitution of Committees of Board of Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIM PLAST LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WIMPLAST] Wim Plast Ltd. Appoints Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Wim Plast Ltd. has appointed Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent Director) on the Board of the Company with effect from 8th March, 2026, for a term of 5 (five) years, subject to approval of the shareholders. Mr. Ranka is not related to the Promoter or Promoter Group or any of the Directors/ Key Managerial Personnel of the Company and fulfills the criteria of independence as required under the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules framed thereunder and the SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Appointment of Mr. Ramesh F. Ranka as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent Director)
  • Mr. Ranka's term is for 5 years, subject to shareholders' approval
  • Mr. Ranka is not related to the Promoter or Promoter Group or any of the Directors/ Key Managerial Personnel of the Company
  • Mr. Ranka fulfills the criteria of independence as required under the Companies Act, 2013 and the SEBI Listing Regulations
  • Mr. Ranka is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any order of the SEBI or any other such authority

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIM PLAST LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting
